characters.description: An independent Flame Vault traveling with Naomi through the Iron Weald. His gold-tempered body and unusual mana practice let him endure punishment and replenish power in ways that surprise even his guide. He seeks Nox while refusing to place himself under a faction's control.
characters.name: Scorio

characters.description: Scorio's Flame Vault companion, whose Nightmare Lady form fights with shadow and a bladed tail. She is determined to learn his unusual mana practice.
characters.name: Naomi

characters.description: An experienced Pyre Lady guiding Scorio and Naomi through the Iron Weald. She trains them in controlled mana use and protects the group with a six-armed ebon Eidolon.
characters.name: the Pyre Lady guide

characters.description: The ruler of the Fury Spires, where he controls the reduced population of resident fiends. His expedition offers Scorio and Naomi provisional protection when they arrive injured.
characters.name: the Iron Tyrant

characters.description: A Charnel Duke associated with a major force in the war against the Blood Ox. He previously tried to recruit Scorio and Naomi for the campaign.
characters.name: Plassus

characters.description: A true fiend holding Last Rock and defeating the forces sent against him. His sanctum prevents a simple intervention by the highest-ranked Great Souls, while continued defeat threatens Bastion and the northern layers.
characters.name: the Blood Ox

characters.description: A former close companion whom Scorio finds alive at the Fury Spires. He treats their reunion cautiously rather than assuming their old friendship remains intact.
characters.name: Lianshi

characters.description: One of Scorio's friends from an earlier life, reborn without the memories they shared. At the Fury Spires, Leonis grants Scorio and Naomi a measure of trust.
characters.name: Leonis

characters.description: An organizer of affairs in the Fiery Shoals who is preparing to leave aboard the Celestial Coffer. Her position makes her an important contact as rival powers gather around the war for Last Rock.
characters.name: Moira

characters.description: The surviving Blazeborn queen of the Fury Spires. She serves the Iron Tyrant because her diminished people cannot resist him alone, accepting subordination as the price of their continued survival.
characters.name: Queen Xandera

characters.description: A Pyre Lord in the Iron Tyrant's service. One of his powers combines willing allies' strength into a single attack, while another constantly makes people feel more favorably toward him, whether he wants the effect or not.
characters.name: Amity

characters.description: Scorio's fiend ally and the teacher whose mana practice helped shape Scorio's unusual abilities. Scorio begins searching for Nox so Naomi can learn the same technique.
characters.name: Nox

characters.description: A Flame Vault assigned to observe Scorio and Naomi for the Iron Tyrant. His permanent power causes people to overlook him unless they focus, leaving him isolated but effective as a spy. He offers covert access to Queen Xandera and hopes for safer companionship.
characters.name: Alain

characters.description: Moira's well-informed student and ally. She warns Scorio that his unexplained arrival and public reputation will be interpreted as evidence of a hidden allegiance, even while he tries to remain independent.
characters.name: Ravenna

characters.description: A Dread Blaze central to the attempt to reclaim Last Rock from the Blood Ox. She is expected to invoke old fiendish oaths and turn much of his army away from him.
characters.name: Jova

characters.description: Lianshi's new romantic interest. Their developing relationship contributes to Lianshi's separation from Leonis and marks Lianshi's decision to judge her present life on its own terms.
characters.name: Juniper

characters.description: A Company 16 Dread Blaze assassin also known as the Shadow Petal. She slips from notice when nobody is thinking about her, can cross visible space instantly, and carries separate blades for cutting bodies and mana.
characters.name: Himiko

characters.description: Two allied fighters of the highest rank expected at the site of the Blood Ox's attack. Their intervention can restore Great Souls who appear to have died, making their arrival decisive for the devastated army.
characters.name: the two Imperators

characters.description: The officer commanding the Iron Vanguard occupation of the Fury Spires. He leads oath-bound subordinates and becomes the primary target when Scorio, Naomi, Alain, and Xandera infiltrate the hive.
characters.name: the Iron Vanguard blood baron

characters.description: A younger self of Queen Xandera who receives permission to leave the Fury Spires with Scorio. She joins his journey toward Last Rock as a Blazeborn companion.
characters.name: Xandera Sextus

characters.description: A puzzle-solving Dread Blaze ally whom Moira recruits to examine the coded records recovered from the fallen Iron Vanguard leader. The codebreaker may be able to decipher the records.
characters.name: the Dread Blaze codebreaker
